live-ban-pak.description: INNINGS BREAK: Bangladesh have declared at 240/9 in their second innings. Pakistan need 268 runs to win. BAN 413 & 240/9d, PAK 386. Bangladesh lead by 267 runs.
Bangladesh battled hard in the second innings, adding 240 runs to set Pakistan a challenging target. The pitch has been assisting the bowlers on Day 5 at the Shere Bangla National Stadium.
Pakistan scored 386 in reply to Bangladesh's first innings 413, trailing by 27 runs. A solid effort from the middle order kept Pakistan in the contest.

result-pbks-dc.description: DC WON! Miller, Axar and Ashutosh keep DC alive with a stunning chase against Punjab Kings in the 55th match of IPL 2026.

result-mi-rcb.description: RCB WON! Royal Challengers Bengaluru defeated Mumbai Indians in the 54th match of IPL 2026 at Wankhede Stadium.
